package rulecoverage

func NegativeRepeatedMapCloneInLoop() string {
    ruleID := "repeated_map_clone_in_loop"
    family := "hot_path"
    severity := "info"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description := "maps.Clone or equivalent map-copy calls observed inside loops."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
